emails.subject: Amendments
emails.body: Amendments David, Per a conversation with John Lavorado he mentioned that an amended agreement was coming for my signature. I was curious as to when I should be expecting the amended agreement, could you confirm please.

emails.subject: Amendments
emails.body: Amendments David, Per a conversation with John Lavorado he mentioned that an amended agreement was coming for my signature. I was curious as to when I should be expecting the amended agreement, could you confirm please.

emails.subject: RE: Amendments
emails.body: RE: Amendments Did you already sign? I'm happy to see if we sort out any confusion on wording later but I think we need to get a signed copy from you asap.

emails.subject: RE: Amendments
emails.body: Yes, I signed and returned the original one last week. Your assistant verified that Enron had received it. It is the revised one I am curious as to the status.
